name: Coconut Curry Haddock

source.cookbook: The Complete and Authentic Thai Curry Cookbook 2
source.author: Various

method: In a large-sized pot, heat the olive oil till extremely hot. Put the haddock; let
cook for 3 minutes each side till browned. Put the garlic, shallot and red
bell pepper; cook and mix for 3 minutes till shallot softens.
Into the pot, add the coconut milk. Mix in the turmeric, coriander, curry
powder and curry paste. Lower the heat; allow to simmer for 6 to 7 minutes
till coconut milk is cooked down by 1/4. Mix in edamame and spinach.
Allow to cook for approximately about 3 to 4 minutes till edamame is
heated completely and spinach is wilted. Scatter green onions on top of
Shrimp and sweet red pepper in coconut curry sauce—this is the dish that
